name_es: Exposiciones Permanentes — Museo Naval del Caribe
title: Exposiciones Permanentes — Museo Naval del Caribe
description: Visitas guiadas y exposiciones sobre la historia maritima de Cartagena, las batallas navales del Caribe y la era colonial. Edificio historico del siglo XVIII en pleno Centro. Entrada: COP $24.000 adultos, COP $10.000 estudiantes, COP $5.000 ninos y militares. Horario: 10am-6pm (9am-6pm en vacaciones).
description_en: Guided tours and exhibitions on Cartagena's maritime history, Caribbean naval battles, and the colonial era. Historic 18th-century building in the heart of the Centro. Entry: COP $24,000 adults, COP $10,000 students, COP $5,000 children and military. Hours: 10am-6pm (9am-6pm during holidays).
